Inode cache 命中率（5m 平均每秒）: Inode Cache Hit Ratio (5m Per-Second Average)
TCP backlog 队列满而导致的数据包丢弃，应用层 accept 速度跟不: Packets dropped because the TCP backlog queue is full; the application layer cannot accept fast enough
TCP 层接收到一个乱序的数据包，但内存不足，丢弃: The TCP layer received an out-of-order packet but dropped it because of insufficient memory
TCP 连接数，当前状态为 ESTABLISHED 或 CLOSE-WAIT: TCP connections currently in the ESTABLISHED or CLOSE-WAIT state
TIME_WAIT 状态的套接字因超出限制而无法分配的数量: Number of TIME_WAIT sockets that could not be allocated because the limit was exceeded
Xlog 空间不足导致的进程睡眠次数（times/s）: Process Sleeps Caused by Insufficient Xlog Space (times/s)
netstat 因缓存区不足导致丢包: netstat Packet Drops Caused by Insufficient Buffer
netstat 缓冲不足导致的丢包: netstat Packet Drops Due to Insufficient Buffer
内存分配失败导致的 TCP 数据包丢弃: TCP packets dropped because of memory allocation failure
可以支持的总 TCP 连接数限制(可为-1): Total supported TCP connection limit (may be -1)
容器访问磁盘d2c延迟超过20ms的IO个数统计（5分钟增量）: Count of container disk IOs with d2c latency over 20ms (5-minute increment)
容器访问磁盘q2c延迟超过20ms的IO个数统计（5分钟增量）: Count of container disk IOs with q2c latency over 20ms (5-minute increment)
宿主kswapd和容器cswapd 对 $container_host 的异步回: Total async reclaim of $container_host by host kswapd and container cswapd (cumulative)
宿主kswapd回收对 $container_host 容器的回收量(累计值): Amount reclaimed from container $container_host by host kswapd (cumulative)
宿主机磁盘RAID flush延迟超过20ms的IO个数统计（5分钟增量）: Count of host disk IOs with RAID flush latency over 20ms (5-minute increment)
宿主机磁盘d2c延迟超过20ms的IO个数统计（5分钟增量）: Count of host disk IOs with d2c latency over 20ms (5-minute increment)
宿主机磁盘q2c延迟超过20ms的IO个数统计（5分钟增量）: Count of host disk IOs with q2c latency over 20ms (5-minute increment)
宿主直接回收和 try_charge 对 $container_host 直接回: Total direct reclaim of $container_host by host direct reclaim and try_charge (cumulative)
宿主直接回收对 $container_host 容器的回收量(累计值): Amount reclaimed from container $container_host by host direct reclaim (cumulative)
尝试将重传数据包发送到下层，但下层返回错误: Tried to send a retransmitted packet to the lower layer, but the lower layer returned an error
当拥塞控制进入恢复状态时，如果不使用 sack，TcpExtTCPRenoRec: When congestion control enters the recovery state, TcpExtTCPRenoRecovery increases by 1 if sack is not used
当拥塞控制进入恢复状态时，如果使用 sack，TcpExtTCPSackReco: When congestion control enters the recovery state, TcpExtTCPSackRecovery increases by 1 if sack is used
When congestion control enters the recovery state, TcpExtTCPSackRecovery increases by 1 if sack is used, and TcpExtTCPRenoRecovery increases by 1 if sack is not used

When congestion control enters the recovery state, TcpExtTCPSackRecovery increases by 1 if sack is used, and TcpExtTCPRenoRecovery increases by 1 if sack is not used. These two counters mean the TCP stack has started retransmitting lost packets
接口接收丢弃的包数量: Number of packets dropped on interface receive
接口接收检测到错误的包: Packets with errors detected on interface receive
数据包 TTL 过小而被丢弃的数据包数量: Number of packets dropped because the packet TTL was too small
由于 TCP Defer Accept 机制导致的数据包丢弃: Packets dropped by the TCP Defer Accept mechanism
由于 TCP 请求队列满而导致的数据包丢弃，半连接队列满，内核瓶颈: Packets dropped because the TCP request queue is full; the SYN queue is full, a kernel bottleneck
由于套接字被锁定，ICMP 数据包被丢弃: ICMP packets dropped because the socket is locked
系统使用的 TCP 内存百分比（相对 TCP 内存总限制）: Percentage of TCP memory used by the system (relative to the total TCP memory limit)
